arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Continue the story of Selhurst with Nketiah, Glasner & more in Man Utd programme
arts.sum: Our season-long celebration of 100 years of Selhurst Park continues in the Crystal Palace v Manchester United matchday programme, on sale NOW!

arts.ttl: Ineos deliver fresh Man United mega stadium hint with £1.4bn Old Trafford blueprint already clear
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe wants Manchester United's new stadium to be one of the biggest in Europe and already has two blueprints

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes Rasmus Hojlund & Mason Mount promise ahead of injury returns
arts.sum: Hojlund hasn't played at all this season since picking up an injury during the summer, while Mount's last appearance came in the second week of the campaign, but both were back in training this week and are in line to return in Saturday's trip to Crystal Palace. Erik ten Hag has vowed not to take any risks with Rasmus Hojlund and Mason Mount after the pair returned to Manchester United training.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner insists there's more to come from Crystal Palace's answer to Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Only Erling Haaland has scored more goals than Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta since Oliver Glasner was appointed at Selhurst Park in February

arts.ttl: Report: Spoils shared betweens Royals and Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s and Reading played out a 1-1 draw at Copers Cope in a cagey affair. A goal from Jemiah Umolu early on in the first-half was cancelled out by Basil Tuma’s equaliser for the visitors.

arts.ttl: Palace fan Pete on how he made the Marathon March a family tradition
arts.sum: Somerset native Pete Trainor, now based in Herne Hill, is what we would call a Marathon March veteran, having completed seven out of eight Marathon Marches.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all eight games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League continues this weekend and Tom Hill has highlighted our writers' best bets for all eight matches taking place on Saturday.

arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Man Utd press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Manchester United at Selhurst Park as the Eagles seek out a first Premier League win of the season – find out what manager Oliver Glasner had to say about the game below.

arts.ttl: Ugarte's tough task at Man Utd, deadly Hudson-Odoi a Forest bargain
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte was typically tenacious on his full Manchester United debut in their Carabao Cup third-round thrashing of Barnsley, his ball-winning ability even leading to a goal when his interception started the move for Alejandro Garnacho's fourth. Welcome to The Radar, a Sky Sports column in which Nick Wright uses a blend of data and opinion to shed light on need-to-know stories from up and down the Premier League.
